criteria.budgetStrategy: Driving trip, off-site or value lodging, limited park days, and careful ticket selection. Disney resort packages are unlikely under this budget for six people unless there is an unusually strong promotion.
preferredResortTypes: Value resort if major promotion appears
mustHave: Works for a three-year-old, six-year-old, teenagers, and two adults
Total estimate close to 2000 to 3000 dollars
niceToHave: One character meal option if the budget survives

agent.summary:
```json
{
  "summary": "The Bell Family Disney World Watch report assesses trip options for a family of six driving from Texarkana/Genoa to Walt Disney World within a target budget of $2,000 to $3,000. The primary strategy focuses on off-site or Good Neighbor hotels with limited park days to stay under budget. Major Disney resort packages are unlikely without strong promotions. Three main trip estimates were analyzed: (1) drive + off-site hotel + 1 park day ($2,850), (2) drive + Good Neighbor hotel + 2 park days (around $3,750), and (3) Disney value resort promotion (around $4,300). Ongoing checks on official Disney special offers and ticket prices show no current deals suitable for the budget. An urgent alert highlights the first option as currently under budget but advises verification before booking.",

    "dealId": "drive-offsite-one-park-day",

    "Monitor hotel rates closely, targeting rooms under $150/night to keep lodging costs reasonable.",
    "Watch official Disney special offers regularly for any sudden promotions that could lower overall costs or upgrade lodging.",
    "Consider Good Neighbor hotel + 2 park days only if total costs approach your maximum budget with discounts.",
    "Avoid booking Disney value resort packages unless a major public promotion significantly lowers the price.",
    "Plan for limited park days to keep ticket costs manageable for six people.",
```

deals.title: Drive + off-site hotel + 1 Disney park day
deals.summary: Most realistic path to Disney inside the $2,000–$3,000 target. It keeps the magic, but limits park tickets.
deals.action: Watch for hotel rooms under $150/night and ticket promos. Book only when the real total stays under $3,000.
deals.label: Strong deal

deals.title: Drive + Good Neighbor hotel + 2 park days
deals.summary: Better Disney feel, but likely above budget unless a hotel or ticket discount appears.
deals.action: Use as stretch target. Alert only if total drops near $3,000.
deals.label: Worth watching

deals.title: Drive + Disney value resort promotion
deals.summary: Best experience, weakest budget fit. This only becomes interesting if Disney posts a major public offer.
deals.action: Watch official Disney special offers. Do not book unless the full math changes.
deals.label: Worth watching
